violations.text: The Certified Food Safety Manager License associated with the establishment was observed to be expired. Application for Food Safety Manager License was printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Application is to be submitted as soon as possible. Establishment is to employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The closing mechanism was observed to be in poor repair not allowing for proper tight closing of the walk-in cooler door. Walk-in door observed maintained ajar unless manually closed and latched with the slide lock. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified/licensed by the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as a Certified Food Safety Manager. Application printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

At the time of inspection, the left side hand sink faucet in the front food service area was observed to be leaking when hot/cold water controls are turned off. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
